introSection: Unknown is a steel single rail roller coaster built by American firm Rocky Mountain Construction currently under construction at Family Kingdom Amusement Park in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was announced in November 2025 at Rocky Mountain Construction's booth at the 2025 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

fullText:
Unknown is a steel single rail roller coaster built by American firm Rocky Mountain Construction currently under construction at Family Kingdom Amusement Park in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA.

The ride was announced in November 2025 at Rocky Mountain Construction's booth at the 2025 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.
